name: Crest Credit Card

rewards.category: utilities, insurance, government, education, real estate, rent
rewards.displayCategory: Utility, insurance, government, education, real estate, and rent spends

domestic: 2 complimentary domestic lounge visits per calendar quarter (effective July 2026 quarter onwards, requires minimum spend of ₹5,00,000 in the previous quarter to unlock access)
international: 2 complimentary international lounge visits per calendar quarter via LoungeKey

exclusions: Fees and charges (including annual fee and finance charges)
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee reversed if spends during the period are ₹10,00,000 or more
Premium golf programme revised to 2 complimentary games and 2 lessons per month effective March 2026
additionalBenefits: Premium wellness, luxury travel, and concierge-style positioning
Exclusive access to the curated Crest lifestyle and travel benefits
1% fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations in India

salaried: Minimum net monthly salary of ₹2,50,000 or Priority/Pioneer Banking relationship
selfEmployed: Minimum annual income/ITR of ₹30 Lakhs or Priority/Pioneer Banking relationship

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
Effective April 1, 2026, spends criteria tracking of ₹5 Lakh per quarter is initiated to unlock domestic lounge access from July 2026 quarter onwards.
Cash credit redemption is capped at 10,000 reward points per calendar month, and is capped at 50% of the total rewards balance.
ITC membership benefit has been discontinued for new customers boarded on or after 15 September 2025 on the Mastercard variant.
